description: Funi Raccoon Game is a game about a Funi Raccoon who steals things.

1.0.0.description:
The first release!
The Mod can be found [here](https://github.com/Jeffdev-Archipelago-Implementations/FuniRaccoonAP/releases/latest)
The Setup Guide can be found [here](https://github.com/Jeffdev-Archipelago-Implementations/Archipelago-Funi/blob/main/worlds/funi_raccoon/docs/setup_en.md)
Information on what this randomizes can be found [here](https://github.com/Jeffdev-Archipelago-Implementations/Archipelago-Funi/blob/main/worlds/funi_raccoon/docs/en_FuniRaccoonGame.md)
1.0.0.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.0.0

1.0.1.description:
Renamed "Find X Mystical Gem" to "Eat X Mystical Gem" for true game parity
Fixed various random logic bugs
1.0.1.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.0.1

1.0.2.description:
**There is no mod update attached to this release.**
- Fixed logic bug where UNDER CONSTRUCTION and Under Construction did not logically require Kei Truck
- Changed GREENISH ABOMINATION to logically require Priestess
- Removed Pickaxe and Fridge Key requirement from a few checks (you can use them without having been sent it, so there was no point in locking logic behind getting them)
1.0.2.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.0.2

1.1.0.description:
- Added **Eurosanity!** All 46 euro locations become checks!
- Added options into the yaml to turn on/off the various sanities
- Renamed "UNDER CONSTRUCTION" in the apworld to "ROAD NOT DONE" to match the in game name
- Renamed Mystical Jewels to Mystical Gems
- Changed 100 Euro from Useful to Filler
- Fixed issue where the jewels and hats would not end up in the multiworld as items.
- Fixed issue (properly this time) where the shop would not let you buy the upgrade checks if you had been sent the truck upgrades.
- Fixed various logic issues.
1.1.0.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.1.0

1.2.0.description:
[Client Mod](https://github.com/Jeffdev-Archipelago-Implementations/FuniRaccoonAP/releases/tag/1.2.0)

- Added **individual item locks** for "usable" items such as pickaxe, firearm, goo, etc. to add more spheres into the rando!
- Added all **3 other endings** as goal options, with individual requirements! (see the yaml for details)
- Added a requirement to have been sent Rusty Ass Old Ass Key and Fridge Key to open their respective areas (can still be stored without being sent them) 
- Added a check for Behrman Speedway, to get 1 minute or less on it
- Added the version number onto the connection panel
- Renamed the Eat Mystical Dumbbell checks to be more explicit about their act locations
- Made the sanity options properly remove locations when disabled, instead of setting as excluded
- Fixed yamlless UT support to actually function properly now
- Rebuilt the regions entirely to better support the new logic, this also means `/get_logical_path` and `/explain` should theoretically work better now
- Fixed bug where hats/gems would despawn when you are sent them from a check, making getting the check for them impossible
- Fixed exploit where you could store items you've received by bringing in the kei truck into the dumpster (the kei truck dumpster is force closed while you are in the dumpster)
- Fixed the nuclear reactor allowing you to enter it without 50 items obtained to start act 4
- Fixed exploit where you could access Blimbo City early going through the Goo Office
- Fixed the popup texts fading at different times
- Fixed the bottom right holding UI displaying items you weren't holding, if it got removed upon leaving the dumpster
- Removed the "Store Kei Truck" check (didn't work properly in the rando given you can't take the truck out of the dumpster)
- Removed access to the ATM while in the Canyon (to prevent exploiting logic)
1.2.0.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.2.0

1.2.3.description:
- Fixed issue where goals wouldn't send properly
- Fixed issue where the Lugh goal didn't properly require the unregistered firearm to be sent
1.2.3.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.2.3

1.2.4.description:
- Fixed bug where the Euro in the gym at the end of the train tracks didn't properly require vending machine and brob energy to obtain logically
- Fixed bug where the Behrman Speedway under 1 minute check didn't require anything in logic to do, when it should require vending machine, brob energy, and 4 mystical dumbbells
- Renamed "Store Flower" to "Store Beautiful Flower" and put it in THE PROCESS region instead of Norwich (mixed it up with Flower Blimbo, oops)
- Renamed the Flower item to Beautiful Flower
1.2.4.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.2.4

1.2.5.description:
- Added glitched logic for some known easier items to get via tricks and such. Experimental, may not be fully accurate/work super well
- Renamed "Store Michi/Gizmo/other cats" to "Store x Cat" (replacing x with the cat name)
1.2.5.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.2.5

1.3.0.description:
`Changes:`
- [Client/APWorld] Removed Lugh quest blocking cause it just wasn't very fun.
- [Client/APWorld] Removed item blocking from the following items: unregistered firearm, Butterfly, Chicken, Vending Machine, Priestess
- [Client] Changed the dumpster to **not block** items coming out of it. As a result of this change, the ATM and the dumpster only spawn items you've thrown into the dumpster for checks, rather than items you've been sent. This should fix Crisp's Undying Love being impossible. **Kei Truck is still blocked as normal, to prevent heavy out of logic cheesing.**

`Fixes:`
- [Client] Fixed bug where the Lugh ending would not trigger 
- [APWorld] Adjusted logic to account for the above new logic setups
- [APWorld] Fixed logic bug where Funi Marketable Plushie was attached to Beenie Factory and not Beenie HQ Post-Purification
- [APWorld] Fixed logic bug where Beenie death: Euro behind cross was attached to Beenie HQ and not Beenie Ascension region
- [APWorld] Added non-existing logic for post-purification Beenie HQ (oops)
- [APWorld] Fixed logic bug where the "Score x Score with Kei Truck" checks wouldn't require the Kei Truck if you had an upgrade (now requires Kei Truck plus either Kei Truck Boost or Kei Truck Toaster)
1.3.0.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.3.0

1.3.1.description:
`Changes:`
- [Client] Added a "To Rackheath" button to the pause menu to go back to the start of the game.
- [APWorld] Moved all items obtainable in Rackheath to sphere 1 requiring no items

`Fixes:`
- [Client] Actually fixed the dumpster bringing items out properly this time
- [APWorld] Changed UT to consider the Lugh goal in logic without the unregistered firearm sent
- [APWorld] Changed the goal option doc text to not mention needing the unregistered firearm for Lugh goal
1.3.1.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.3.1

1.3.2.description:
- Fixed a big amount of logic issues
- Re-arranged regions and added a few to make it more accurate
- Renamed "Store Funbells" to "Store Dumbbells"
- Added slot data for the current map you are on, for future use with the upcoming poptracker
1.3.2.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.3.2

1.4.0.description:
This release is accompanied with a poptracker! You can download the poptracker [here](https://github.com/Jeffdev-Archipelago-Implementations/FuniRaccoonPopTracker/releases/latest)

- [Client] Fixed popups not displaying until after you'd be sent something for the second time
- [Client] Added datastorage support for keeping track of position in the map, for the poptracker
- [APWorld] Fixed a logic bug where Evil Fish didn't require Goo like it should have
1.4.0.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.4.0

1.4.1.description: - Adjusted item requirements for Fellowship goal to properly reflect the actual games requirements for that ending.
1.4.1.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.4.1

1.5.0.description:
`New:`
- [Client/APWorld] Added new option in the yaml for **Dumpster Weight Blocking.** This will prevent you from storing items you can't logically hold in your hands with the dumpster. This is enabled by default, but can be disabled, and if it is disabled logic **will expect you to use the truck to get heavy objects.**

`Changes:`
- [Client] Changed the level select orb item counter to be based on items you've put in the dumpster

`Fixes:`
- [Client] Fixed bug where the entrance locking gates were based on all items, rather than specifically dumpster items.
- [Client] Fixed bug where you could purchase picked up hats without being sent them
- [APWorld] Updated Pirate 3 to require 2 dumbbells as intended, rather than 1 dumbbell in logic
- [APWorld] Updated BLMB Reactor Core to require 1 Progressive Cooling Rod, fixing a bunch of region related logic bugs
- [APWorld] Fixed a bug where Trasco Carpark entrance logic was requiring both Toaster and Boost when it only needed either or
- [APWorld] Updated Funi Raccoon Game Deluxe logic to properly require act 4 access correctly
1.5.0.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.5.0

1.5.1.description:
## Changes:
- Put items into item groups for easier hinting
- Made all dumpster items except the ones that are notable progression deprioritized

## Logic Changes:
- Fixed Michi and boingler having swapped rule requirements
- Removed the Kei Truck Boost/Toaster requirement from logic, as its not needed and pretty easy to circumvent
- Added Kei Truck Toaster/Boost logic requirement to Bell Boy
- Changed "Store Michi Cat" to require 25 dumpster items (need Beenie HQ access)
- Changed Buisness Man to require 0 strength logically
- Changed Ms./Mr. Heel to require 0 strength logically
- Changed Patrick O'Hara to require 2 strength upgrades logically
- Changed Cheese Wife to require 1 strength logically
- Changed Divider to require 0 strength logically
- Changed Plimbo to require 0 strength logically
- Changed Kettle to require 0 strength logically

**This update is an APWorld only update. You can play this with any v1.5.x client mod version.**
1.5.1.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.5.1

1.6.0.description:
*The biggest update to Funi Raccoon Game AP yet!*

`New:`
- **Added new storable item checks:** Friend Martin Friendship Statue, Doggy, Brazil Knight, Real Football, Hintblo, Blimbo City Sign, Trasco Sign, Mikk Masive Sign
- **Added 2 new checks to Eurosanity:** one in Brazil, another in Hat Store after saving Toastie
- **Added 2 new traps:** Police Trap, Phone Ratio Trap (if enabled, fills in about 20% of the filler with traps)
- **Added new progression item for accessing Brazil:** Brazil Train Ticket
- Added an option in the yaml to randomize the Raccoon color, making it change on every room transition.
- **Locked down the effects of the following items until you are sent them:** Chicken, Butterfly
- Added the option to change the amount of items needed for each cluster access. By default, it is:
  - Museum: 15 items
  - Act 2: 25 items
  - Act 3: 35 items
  - Act 4: 50 items (The act 4 threshold also changes the required dumpster items for the Orb, Lugh, and Fellowship goal. The museum goal always requires 100 dumpster items.)
  - **NOTE: This option may have some quirky generation errors that may occur. I did my best to fix as much as I could, but please report if you run into any!**
- Re-added Lugh Quest Locking as an' option, requiring unregistered firearm, Flowian, Funi Marketable Plushie, and Anti-Sads for their respective Lugh quests to access specific areas.
- Added an blackened held item indicator if you haven't "unlocked" their use yet, to make it clearer you need their item
- Added the function helper keys and what they do to the game information documentation.

`Changes:`
- **Changed the Goal option to allow for selecting multiple goals at once.**
- Changed Orb, Chicken, Butterfly, Belgium Waffle, Priestess, GREENISH ABOMINATION to not be progression deprioritized like other dumpster items.
- Changed all Dumpster items to also have the tag for "skip_balancing".
- Changed the Siopa Riz shop to actually display the item you are gaining, and set it to auto hint them when viewing them in the shop.
- Changed the function key settings to stay at what you set them to when setting them even after reloading the save file, for stuff like filtering messages, item popups, etc.
- Changed "Store Fridge" to also be accessible logically with Brazil Train Ticket
- Changed the game to automatically enable streamer mode on connect, to make Hintblo always appear.
- Improved handling of failed connections and errors.
- Reduced the size of the in game text client.
- Changed the item popups to immedatiely go away if disconnecting, and automatically stop popping up if you press F3 to disable them by clearing out the item queue.

`Fixes:`
- Fixed auto tracking with the poptracker to not swap all connected poptrackers at once in a multiworld when switching areas.
- Fixed Kei Truck not being counted as a Dumpster item in logic.
1.6.0.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.6.0

1.6.1.description:
- Added dumbbell weight requirements to each of the new items because im dumb and forgot them before
- Changed Store Buisness Man to require 1 dumbbell logically
- Changed Store Windmill to go in logic if you gain act 3 access with truck
- Changed Store Crackhead to logically require 2 dumbbells, with an out of logic rule attached since its possible to break him to store him.
1.6.1.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.6.1

1.6.2.description:
- Updated Euro in moai head pool 1-6 to require kei truck boost and toaster
- Updated Crisps undying love to require unregistered firearm
1.6.2.title: Funi Raccoon Game Archipelago v1.6.2
